channel.title: Cpp on Zakariya Oulhadj
channel.description: Recent content in Cpp on Zakariya Oulhadj

item.title: Why I prefer C instead of C++
item.description:
Disclaimer: This blog post is meant to be a light hearted rant/discussion on some of C++’s pitfalls and is highly opinionated. I’m sure many will attempt to find flaws in my arguments so take everything with a grain of salt. End of the day, you can program in any language you like, just remember to keep things simple.

TLDR: Only gigachads write in C.

Background

Very early on

  • Casey Muratori (Granny3D, Handmade Hero)
  • Johnathan Blow (Braid, The Witness)
  • Sean Barret (Author of STB libraries)
  • Ryan Fluerer (Author of RAD Debugger)
  • Eskil Steenberg
  • Shawn McGrath

“Is the pixel an object or is it a group of objects? Is there a container? Do I have to ask a factory to get me a color?”
